how.title: Share Your Idea
how.desc: Tell us what you want — a sketch, description or reference image is enough.

how.title: We Design & Quote
how.desc: We prepare a digital model and send you a quote within 24 hours.

how.title: Approve & Print
how.desc: Once you approve, we start printing with precision on our professional 3D printer.

how.title: Delivered to You
how.desc: Your print is carefully packaged and delivered within 5–7 working days.

faq.a: We primarily use PLA filament — durable, eco-friendly and available in all our colour options.

faq.q: How long does an order take?
faq.a: Standard orders take 5–7 working days from confirmation.

faq.q: Can I order a completely custom design?
faq.a: Absolutely! Contact us at orders@forgelayer.online with your idea, sketch or reference image. We quote within 24 hours.
Black, White, Red, Pink, Orange, Sky Blue and Grey. Contact us if you need something different.

faq.q: How do I place an order?
faq.a: Browse our categories, pick a product, then email orders@forgelayer.online.

faq.q: Can I see a preview before printing?
faq.a: Yes! For custom orders we send a digital render for your approval before printing.

faq.q: What is the maximum print size?
faq.a: Our printer supports up to 256 × 256 × 256 mm. Larger items can be printed in sections and joined.
Yes, we ship throughout Germany. Shipping costs confirmed at order.
Since all prints are custom-made, we do not accept returns unless there is a manufacturing defect.

faq.q: How do I send my design files?
faq.a: Send STL, OBJ or 3MF files to orders@forgelayer.online. We can also design from scratch.

order.title: Get in Touch
order.subtitle: Ready to bring your idea to life? Contact us — we reply within 24 hours.
